S.FORM: Otis Birdsong sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1955, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 9, Otis Birdsong, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: otis~…ē ő≤ir*s~…ēoŇč s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, otis~…ē ő≤ir*s~…ēoŇč, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
